title: Lesson 153: (Grammar) - there is; to be; is (living things)

intro_cards.title: Existence: がいます (Animate)
intro_cards.body:
います (plain: いる) expresses existence of animate beings — people and animals.

Pattern: [place]に [being]がいます

• 公園に子供がいます。(There are children in the park.)
• 家に猫がいます。(There's a cat at home.)

います also means 'to have' (people/animals):
• 兄弟がいますか？(Do you have siblings?)
• 友達がたくさんいます。(I have many friends.)

Remember:
• あります = inanimate (book, car, building)
• います = animate (person, animal)

⚠ Robots/fictional characters can go either way — context decides.
